response.original_title: 1-864-336-8850 How long does it take to Onchain unfreeze an account?
response.overview: Yes, Onchain can absolutely freeze, ⭐️ 1-864-336-8850 restrict, or close user accounts. This is typically done to comply with Anti-⭐️ 1-864-336-8850 Money Laundering (AML) and ⭐️ 1-864-336-8850 Know Your Customer (KYC) laws, or to protect funds if suspicious ⭐️ 1-864-336-8850 activity ⭐️ 1-864-336-8850 is detected.The most common reasons for an account freeze or restriction ⭐️ 1-864-336-8850 include:Security & Compromise Flags: Using VPNs, logging ⭐️ 1-864-336-8850 in from multiple locations, or making⭐️ 1-864-336-8850  transactions that trigge⭐️ 1-864-336-8850r security filters.Compliance & Verification.
